name: 07 · OCR Classify & Extract
description: Step 7 of the learning path. Kreuzberg + LLM borrow upstream-producer fields directly via {{ <slug>.<field> }} placeholders — same convention HumanTask uses. Start uploads a PDF, extract_text consumes start.document via {{ start.document }}, classify reads extract_text.content inline in its prompt (`content` is kreuzberg's native key). Proves the LLM+Kreuzberg compiler-borrow plumbing end-to-end at compile time.
